title: Screenshake
description: A light weight mod that allows you to shake camera with commands
body:
![description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc802db72421d92baba18cf850e3f2c2c68f3e6b.png)
This mod allows you to shake camera with commands , it works on the server and on the singleplayer

/screenshake [player] [lvl] [duration] - shaking a player , works only with OP

/creenshake_client [lvl] [duration] - can do without OP , only you see that shake

**Please support author**
